invariants.scope: Gauntlet and debate token accounting write boundaries
invariants.rule: Token accounting writes happen exactly once at the active model dispatch boundary for each successful model call.
invariants.enforcement: Move gauntlet writes into gauntlet/model_dispatch.call_model(); keep debate-side writes inside models.py handlers; delete phase-level tracker writes.
invariants.verification: Deterministic mocked dispatch parity covers one representative call pattern per gauntlet phase and proves totals are single-counted.

invariants.scope: Production tracker import and access pattern
invariants.rule: Production modules do not import or bind the tracker singleton directly; they resolve token_tracking.tracker at call time.
invariants.enforcement: Static audit rejects from token_tracking import tracker, module-level tracker rebinding, CostTracker, cost_tracker, and tracker.add/cost_tracker.add in production paths.
invariants.verification: Post-rename rg checks in spec Section 13 return zero production matches, with any historical test strings enumerated in implementation evidence.

invariants.rule: Tests that need isolated accounting state use fresh_tracker against the public tracker owner module instead of phase-local tracker monkeypatches.
invariants.enforcement: Two-phase fixture migration: patch models.cost_tracker before token_tracking.py exists, then patch token_tracking.tracker after the boundary move.
exceptions: Narrow failure-injection tests may monkeypatch record_call directly when they name the consumer under test and assert call semantics.
invariants.verification: Targeted tests and post-rename audit show direct phase-local cost_tracker.add monkeypatches were removed or explicitly justified.
